meaning: n.压缩物,压缩机,[医]收缩肌
examples: The Soviet scientist made his experiments with a bad light, on wooden tables, using an old vacuum cleaner instead of a compressor.
The YUI compressor can also minify CSS.
For every unit of energy to drive the compressor, the pump yields four units of heat.
Barney Clark had tubes sticking out of his chest to an air compressor that powered the Jarvik-7.
